analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet announces the launch of US-UK FTA negotiations, framing it as a positive step that will bring jobs and prosperity to both countries. Evaluation: US1 (honorable tradition) – Not invoked; no reference to values, history, or legacy. US2 (admirable society) – Not mentioned; no focus on people, civil society, or groups. US3 (hostile enemies) – No adversaries referenced. US4 (force for good) – Not about human rights or global peace; it's economic cooperation. US5 (great international ally) – Yes: it praises cooperation with the UK and highlights supportive, beneficial allied relations. US6 (at the forefront) – Not explicitly; while it concerns trade, it doesn't position the US as leading or number one. Conclusion: The tweet promotes US5.
